Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTable.PotTableRow

  • Uses of PotTable.PotTableRow in cc.quaternion.potshaper

    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return PotTable.PotTableRow
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all cells in this row.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.bold()
    Applies bold formatting to text in all cells in this row.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.bold(boolean bold)
    Sets the bold formatting state for text in all cells in this row.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.fill(PotColor color)
    Sets the background fill color for all cells in this row.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.fontColor(PotColor color)
    Sets the font color for text in all cells in this row.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.fontSize(double size)
    Sets the font size for text in all cells in this row.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.PotTableRow.height(double height)
    Sets the height of this row.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    PotTable.row(int row)
    Returns a wrapper for the row at the specified index.
